title: The Straw Hats Enter the Sun World
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Brook, Nami, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Road as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, it's awful how he didn't give any of you a choice when he put you in there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: believe me, I wouldn't associate at all with that freak if I had a choice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're very sorry about all this!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Oh, you're talking about that skull-faced guy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, just now, you came from the realm of the dead, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but what were you doing down there? Did you fall?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAHA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Remember, our deal is a secret...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so don't say a word about our meeting. Got it, Luffy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AH... Ummm...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Y"know... haaha...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're awfully sweaty even though it's freezing out here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Anyway, I'm just glad you're okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Elbaf, realm of the sun (second level)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: THERE YOU ARE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's time to come home!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My precious livedolls-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: KYAAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Now, let's get you locked up again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Before the others catch on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Nami-Taso!! Cho-Taso!!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: YOU TWO WILL BE MINE FOR LIFE!! DEFU!! ♙

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hardy BOP-!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously, even animals don't fall for bait that obvious!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZORO!! Sanji!! You guys always overdo it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You didn't even lift a finger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright, let's go check out this land of giants already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Y-YOU DAMNED PUNY HUMANS...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He's here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: th-that voice... it's Gerd- Taso!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And so are the other straw hats!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: She must be here to save me..."

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: Yeah right, Road!! You freakin' weirdo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: HOWEEE VAAAH!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
